3. ā-√śī Ā. (irr. -śaye [3. sg.]  RV. ;  AV.  : Impv. 3. sg. ā-śayām,  AV. v, 25, 9 ; 3. pl. -śerate,  Vikr. )
to lie or rest on or round:
P. (impf. 3. pl. āSayan) to wish,  BhP. ix, 1, 37  [perhaps this form is rather a Nom. from 1. āśā?] :

results.rendered_html:
āśī [āśīryate'nayā, ā-śṝ-kvip pṛ˚]
1 A serpent's fang.
2 A kind of venom.
3 A blessing, benediction.
Comp.
— viṣaḥ [āśyāṃ viṣamasya]
1 a snake; garutmadāśīviṣabhīmadarśanaiḥ  R. 3. 57. 
2 a particular kind of snake; karṇāśīviṣabhoginipraśamite  Ve. 6. 1.

results.rendered_html:
āśī 2 A.
1 To lie or sleep on; kusumānyāśerate ṣaṭpadāḥ  V. 2. 23  v. l.
2 To pass (the night) in sleep.
3 To wish, pray for.
4 To dwell, live, inhabit.
